name: Han Solo
bannerMiniatureIdeas: A small sculpture of the Millennium Falcon with glowing quad lasers, mounted on an asteroid base with Chewbacca's bowcaster leaning against it
A tattered Rebel Alliance flag wrapped around a carbonite slab featuring Han's frozen face, with a miniature Wookiee totem standing guard
A rocky totem carved like a Kessel Run hyperspace route, topped with a tiny model of the Falcon cockpit and Chewbacca's bandolier
vehicleSuggestions: Millennium Falcon (iconic smuggling ship — perfect for a mobile, evasive duo)
Modified YT-1300 Light Freighter (emphasizing Han's piloting expertise and custom mods)
Landspeeder (nod to their early Tatooine adventures and fast getaways)

factionTrait.name: Tactician Champion
factionTrait.text: A tactician moves the turn token +1 step when they make a claim action.

uniqueTraits.name: Scoundrel
uniqueTraits.text: After Han Solo makes an action during his activation, if he is within 3 hexes of Chewbacca, you may place Chewbacca in a hex up to 2 hexes from his current hex.

ultimate.name: Kessel Run
ultimate.text: Choose any number of objective hexes within 3 hexes of Chewbacca. Move each up to 1 hex onto an empty non-objective hex in any order. Models on the objective hexes move with them.

plotSkills.name: Let the Wookiee Win
plotSkills.text: If Chewbacca is within range, he gains {protection_boon} or {damage_die_boon}.

plotSkills.name: Smuggler's Gambit
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move a boon from the target to any model within range.

clashSkills.name: Swindle
clashSkills.text: Remove all boons from enemies within range.

traits.name: Life Debt
traits.text: When Chewbacca is knocked out, replace him with an objective hex.

plotSkills.name: Furious Roar
plotSkills.text: Friendly and enemy models adjacent to Chewbacca gain {protection_blight}.

plotSkills.name: Bowcaster Blast
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move target champion or all followers in target's unit up to 2 hexes.

clashSkills.name: Bowcaster Blast
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move target champion or all followers in target's unit up to 2 hexes.
